business_ideas.idea: Low earth orbit imaging satellites (cheaper via SpaceX, $100K not $1M)
Autonomous drones/vehicles/defense tech (multi-form factor, thousands vs planes)
AI tutoring for specific tests (SAT, MCAT, bar exam) - one-on-one personalization
Digital twin CEO (AI system absorbing all company knowledge and Slack history)
Billboard in space viewable via telescope (fun idea, not primary)
Nuclear power plant on moon to mine water and produce rocket fuel

predictions.text: Space tech becoming accessible/cheap; satellites now $100K not $1M with SpaceX
Defense/autonomous tech massively under-competed compared to AI startups
One-on-one AI tutoring for specific tests will disrupt multi-decade prep companies
AI will eventually compete in regulated spaces (legal, medical) as adoption grows
